children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), a covered air carrier shall not deny a passenger the ability to check a stroller at the departure gate if the stroller is being used by a passenger to transport a child traveling on the same flight as the passenger.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply in instances where the size or weight of the stroller poses a safety or security risk.

children.heading: .—Covered Air Carrier Defined
children.label: c .—Covered Air Carrier Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “covered air carrier” means an air carrier or a foreign air carrier as those terms are defined in , United States Code.section 40102 of title 49
